\doxysubsubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{ReadAndPrint()}{ReadAndPrint()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{group__driver_ga3b2ef62f0ee5a558bf60dfa50d961d7a} 
template$<$class T$>$ \\
int Read\+And\+Print (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{std\+::ifstream \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{in\+Stream}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Debug helper\+: read a value of type {\ttfamily T} and print it to std\+::cout. 

Uses \doxylink{group__driver_ga3859b179ce92396b3d9187e4437d8826}{Read\+Commented} to attempt a read from {\ttfamily in\+Stream}; prints "{}\+Error!"{} if no value could be read/parsed, otherwise prints the value followed by a newline. The function always returns 0 (it is intended for quick debugging).


\begin{DoxyTemplParams}{Template Parameters}
{\em T} & Destination type (must be stream-\/extractable via operator\texorpdfstring{$>$}{>}\texorpdfstring{$>$}{>}). \\
\hline
\end{DoxyTemplParams}

\begin{DoxyParams}[1]{Parameters}
\mbox{\texttt{ in,out}}  & {\em in\+Stream} & Pointer to an open std\+::ifstream to read from. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
Always 0. 
\end{DoxyReturn}

\Hypertarget{group__driver_ga3859b179ce92396b3d9187e4437d8826}\index{Driver \& Jobs@{Driver \& Jobs}!ReadCommented@{ReadCommented}}
\index{ReadCommented@{ReadCommented}!Driver \& Jobs@{Driver \& Jobs}}
\doxysubsubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{ReadCommented()}{ReadCommented()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{group__driver_ga3859b179ce92396b3d9187e4437d8826} 
template$<$class T$>$ \\
int Read\+Commented (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{std\+::ifstream \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{in\+Stream}{, }\item[{T \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{target}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Read a value of type {\ttfamily T} from a text stream, skipping lines beginning with \textquotesingle{}\#\textquotesingle{}. 

Attempts to extract the next non-\/comment token from {\ttfamily in\+Stream} and parse it into {\ttfamily target} using operator\texorpdfstring{$>$}{>}\texorpdfstring{$>$}{>} on a temporary std\+::stringstream. If the next token starts with \textquotesingle{}\#\textquotesingle{}, the remainder of that line is discarded and the search continues. The function returns immediately after parsing a single value or if end-\/of-\/file/error is reached.


\begin{DoxyTemplParams}{Template Parameters}
{\em T} & Destination type (must be stream-\/extractable via operator\texorpdfstring{$>$}{>}\texorpdfstring{$>$}{>}). \\
\hline
\end{DoxyTemplParams}

\begin{DoxyParams}[1]{Parameters}
\mbox{\texttt{ in,out}}  & {\em in\+Stream} & Pointer to an open std\+::ifstream to read from. \\
\hline
\mbox{\texttt{ out}}  & {\em target} & Pointer to the destination variable to receive the value. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
0 on success; 1 on failure to parse or on reaching EOF without reading a value.
\end{DoxyReturn}
\begin{DoxyParagraph}{Behavior}

\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Skips tokens that begin with \textquotesingle{}\#\textquotesingle{}, consuming the rest of that line.
\item Accepts multiple values per line; stops after extracting the first valid value.
\item Leaves the stream positioned after the consumed token (or end of file on failure).
\end{DoxyItemize}
\end{DoxyParagraph}
\begin{DoxyWarning}{Warning}
This function assumes that comment markers appear as the first character of a token. Comments that appear {\itshape after} a value on the same line must be separated by whitespace (e.\+g., "{}42 \# note"{}). 
\end{DoxyWarning}

\doxysubsubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{ReadCommentedG()}{ReadCommentedG()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{group__driver_ga3842e19dc8aa8af24b8d124aaed5b296} 
template$<$class T$>$ \\
int Read\+CommentedG (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{std\+::ifstream \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{in\+Stream}{, }\item[{T \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{target}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Read a value of type {\ttfamily T} from a text stream, skipping lines beginning with \textquotesingle{}\$\textquotesingle{}. 

Identical semantics to \doxylink{group__driver_ga3859b179ce92396b3d9187e4437d8826}{Read\+Commented} except that lines whose first token starts with \textquotesingle{}\$\textquotesingle{} are treated as comments.


\begin{DoxyTemplParams}{Template Parameters}
{\em T} & Destination type (must be stream-\/extractable via operator\texorpdfstring{$>$}{>}\texorpdfstring{$>$}{>}). \\
\hline
\end{DoxyTemplParams}

\mbox{\texttt{ in,out}}  & {\em in\+Stream} & Pointer to an open std\+::ifstream to read from. \\
\hline
\mbox{\texttt{ out}}  & {\em target} & Pointer to the destination variable to receive the value. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
0 on success; 1 on failure to parse or on reaching EOF without reading a value. 
\end{DoxyReturn}
